title: Concentric nested bundle with 45-degree bend march
summary: A multi-strand bundle turns a 90-degree corner as concentric parallel corners. Bend points march diagonally at 45 degrees while a separate strand below keeps a larger inter-bundle gap.
visually_observable_good_behavior: A ~10-strand bundle turns as concentric parallel 90-degree corners.
Bend points march diagonally at 45 degrees with consistent intra-bundle pitch.
A separate strand below maintains a larger gap from the main bundle.
Intra-bundle spacing stays fixed while inter-bundle gap varies appropriately.

followed_requirements: Related fiber strands stay visually grouped through bends.
Nested strands use adjacent routing lanes as an organized group.
likely_followed_rules.why_this_image_passes: The bundle preserves concentric nested bend geometry through the corner.

followed_requirements: Individual fiber strand routes maintain the 24px grid pitch.
Spacing applies around bends and between strand groups.
likely_followed_rules.why_this_image_passes: Intra-bundle pitch is consistent; inter-bundle gap is visibly larger.

followed_requirements: Fiber strands route on grid lines with approved bend points.
Bend points align to grid intersections.
likely_followed_rules.why_this_image_passes: Bend points march on a consistent 45-degree diagonal grid rhythm.

legacy_rule_mapping.note: Spacing constants 4.2 referenced in legacy R-label README.

notes: Positive reference for center-nest / concentric corner behavior.
